statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1246 — Liar-type NOT-fixed-point in D-FUMT₈ SELF⟲ axis, not captured
              by Priest FDE 4-value embedding — Axiom-Free in Lean 4

  Trigger: 2026-07-01 session chat-Claude Pyrrho arc arrives at the thesis
  "NEITHER/SELF⟲ = load-bearing multi-value primitive that classical
  2-valued logic cannot represent" and inscribes in the artifact footer:

      「NEITHERが四値FDEに還元されないことの分離証明は、
       まだ Lean4 の向こうにある」
      (public/tools/pyrrho-all-circuits/index.html, chat-Claude 2026-07-01)

  This STEP retroactively strengthens that footer by establishing the
  intended separation theorem
